title: woodsia pulchella
intro: Woodsia pulchella, also known as the delicate woodsia, is a species of fern in the family Woodsiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Woodsia pulchella include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
